attributes.action: To Make the sitting Prime Minister answer questions asked only and not deviate.
attributes.additional_details: I am a British Tax payer and a voter and an absolutely frustrated that at PMQ’s the sitting Prime Minister’s of any party never answer the questions that the opposite leaders ask .
attributes.background: To make the sitting Prime Minister answer the questions by opposition leader put to him honestly and not deviate and not answer the questions.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
